query:
-- Check billing items for CPM Advisory (the top SasBoss service without assignment)
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.matchStatus, bi.serviceExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId = (
  SELECT externalId FROM customers WHERE name LIKE '%CPM Advisory%' LIMIT 1
)
LIMIT 10;
